title: Qingyuan
description: Qingyuan Chai is an Assistant Professor of Economics at NYU Shanghai. She graduated with a PhD in Economics from Boston University in 2025. Qingyuan researches in labor economics and development economics. Her working papers can be viewed here.
text:
Qingyuan Chai
Qingyuan Chai is an Assistant Professor of Economics at NYU Shanghai. She graduated with a PhD in Economics from Boston University in 2025. Qingyuan researches in labor economics and development economics. Her working papers can be viewed here. Her CV can be viewed here.
Education
PhD, EconomicsBoston University
BA, Mathematical EconomicsFudan University
Labor Economics
Development Economics
